What is the total sales for 2024-10?: SELECT SUM(total_sales) FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE year_month = '2024-10' AND order_type = 'SHIPMENT'
Show me the total OTR sales for AMERICAS: SELECT year_month, SUM(total_sales) as total_sales FROM [ods].[fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing] WHERE year_month = FORMAT(GETDATE(), 'yyyy-MM') AND ru = 'AMERICAS' GROUP BY year_month
Show me the total backlog sales in 2025: SELECT year_month, SUM(total_sales) AS total_backlog FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE order_type <> 'SHIPMENT' AND year_month = '2025-02' GROUP BY year_month
Show me the total backlog sales for AMER: SELECT SUM(total_sales) AS current_backlog FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE ru = 'AMERICAS' AND order_type <> 'SHIPMENT'
Show me the total backlog sales for DELL: SELECT SUM(total_sales) AS total_backlog FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE customer_parent = 'DELL' AND order_type <> 'SHIPMENT' AND year_month = '2025-02'
Find quantity sold to Infineon Tech for: SELECT SUM(total_qty) AS total_quantity_sold FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE (customer_parent = 'INFINEON TECHNOLOGIES' OR local_assembler = 'INFINEON TECHNOLOGIES' OR final_customer = 'INFINEON TECHNOLOGIES') AND order_type = 'SHIPMENT' AND year_month LIKE '2025%'
Show me the BB Ratio for Magnetics in Ja: WITH bill AS (SELECT SUM(total_sales) AS s FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE year_month = '2025-01' AND pbg = 'Magnetics' AND order_type = 'SHIPMENT'), book AS (SELECT SUM(total_sales) AS s FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_booking WHERE year_month = '2025-01' AND pbg = 'Magnetics') SELECT book.s / NULLIF(bill.s, 0) AS BB_Ratio FROM bill CROSS JOIN book
Show me the BB Ratio for Capacitor in Ja: WITH bill AS (SELECT SUM(total_sales) AS s FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE year_month = '2025-01' AND pbg = 'Capacitor' AND order_type = 'SHIPMENT'), book AS (SELECT SUM(total_sales) AS s FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_booking WHERE year_month = '2025-01' AND pbg = 'Capacitor') SELECT book.s / NULLIF(bill.s, 0) AS BB_Ratio FROM bill CROSS JOIN book
What is the BB Qty Ratio for AMERICAS in: WITH bill AS (SELECT SUM(total_qty) AS q FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE year_month = '2024-12' AND ru = 'AMERICAS' AND order_type = 'SHIPMENT'), book AS (SELECT SUM(total_qty) AS q FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_booking WHERE year_month = '2024-12' AND ru = 'AMERICAS') SELECT book.q / NULLIF(bill.q, 0) AS BB_Qty_Ratio FROM bill CROSS JOIN book
What is the POA M/M Growth % for 2024-12: WITH curr AS (SELECT SUM(total_sales) as s FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE year_month='2024-12' AND order_type='SHIPMENT'), prior AS (SELECT SUM(total_sales) as s FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE year_month='2024-11' AND order_type='SHIPMENT') SELECT (curr.s - prior.s) / NULLIF(prior.s, 0) as MoM_Percent FROM curr CROSS JOIN prior
What was the POA QoQ Growth % for Q2 202: WITH q2 AS (SELECT SUM(total_sales) as s FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE year_month IN ('2024-04','2024-05','2024-06') AND order_type='SHIPMENT'), q1 AS (SELECT SUM(total_sales) as s FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE year_month IN ('2024-01','2024-02','2024-03') AND order_type='SHIPMENT') SELECT (q2.s - q1.s) / NULLIF(q1.s, 0) as QoQ_Percent FROM q2 CROSS JOIN q1
Compare total sales YoY for GREAT CHINA: WITH curr AS (SELECT SUM(total_sales) as s FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE year_month='2024-12' AND ru='GREAT CHINA' AND order_type='SHIPMENT'), prior AS (SELECT SUM(total_sales) as s FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE year_month='2023-12' AND ru='GREAT CHINA' AND order_type='SHIPMENT') SELECT (curr.s - prior.s) / NULLIF(prior.s, 0) as YoY_Percent FROM curr CROSS JOIN prior
What is the ASP for capacitors in 2024?: SELECT SUM(total_sales) / NULLIF(SUM(total_qty), 0) FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE pbg = 'Capacitor' AND year_month LIKE '2024%' AND order_type = 'SHIPMENT'
SELECT SUM(total_budget) FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_budget WHERE year_month = FORMAT(DATEADD(month, -1, GETDATE()), 'yyyy-MM') -- Proxy: Latest Closed Month (System Date calculated)
SELECT SUM(total_sales) FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE order_type = 'SHIPMENT' AND year_month >= FORMAT(DATEADD(quarter, DATEDIFF(quarter, 0, DATEADD(month, -1, GETDATE())), 0), 'yyyy-MM') AND year_month <= FORMAT(DATEADD(month, -1, GETDATE()), 'yyyy-MM') -- Proxy: QTD based on Latest Closed Month
WITH Billing AS (SELECT ru, SUM(total_sales) as s FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE year_month = FORMAT(DATEADD(month, -1, GETDATE()), 'yyyy-MM') AND order_type='SHIPMENT' GROUP BY ru), Budget AS (SELECT ru, SUM(total_budget) as b FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_budget WHERE year_month = FORMAT(DATEADD(month, -1, GETDATE()), 'yyyy-MM') GROUP BY ru) SELECT Billing.ru, (Billing.s - Budget.b) as Variance_Amount FROM Billing JOIN Budget ON Billing.ru = Budget.ru ORDER BY Variance_Amount ASC
What is the POA Budget YTD for 2025 up t: SELECT SUM(total_budget) FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_budget WHERE year_month >= '2025-01' AND year_month <= (SELECT MAX(year_month) FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_budget WHERE year_month LIKE '2025%')
What is the POA Hit Rate % for 2025 YTD?: WITH Billing AS (SELECT SUM(total_sales) as s FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE year_month LIKE '2025%' AND order_type='SHIPMENT'), Budget AS (SELECT SUM(total_budget) as b FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_budget WHERE year_month LIKE '2025%') SELECT Billing.s / NULLIF(Budget.b, 0) FROM Billing CROSS JOIN Budget
Analyze Gross Profit by Region (ru) in Q: SELECT ru, SUM(total_sales) - SUM(total_cost) AS gross_profit FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE year_month IN ('2024-10','2024-11','2024-12') AND order_type = 'SHIPMENT' GROUP BY ru
What is the total sales for 'Focus' prod: SELECT SUM(total_sales) FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE focus_flag = 'Yes' AND year_month = '2025-01' AND order_type = 'SHIPMENT'
What is the Hit Rate % for AMERICAS in 2: WITH Billing AS (SELECT SUM(total_sales) as s FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE ru='AMERICAS' AND year_month='2025-02' AND order_type='SHIPMENT'), Budget AS (SELECT SUM(total_budget) as b FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_budget WHERE ru='AMERICAS' AND year_month='2025-02') SELECT Billing.s / NULLIF(Budget.b, 0) as Hit_Rate FROM Billing CROSS JOIN Budget
What is the hit rate for Apple in Q1 202: WITH Billing_Apple AS (SELECT SUM(total_sales) AS billing_sales FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE year_month IN ('2025-01', '2025-02', '2025-03') AND order_type = 'SHIPMENT' AND (customer_parent LIKE '%APPLE%' OR SOUNDEX(customer_parent) = SOUNDEX('APPLE') OR local_assembler LIKE '%APPLE%' OR SOUNDEX(local_assembler) = SOUNDEX('APPLE') OR final_customer LIKE '%APPLE%' OR SOUNDEX(final_customer) = SOUNDEX('APPLE'))), Budget_Apple AS (SELECT SUM(total_budget) AS budget FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_budget WHERE year_month IN ('2025-01', '2025-02', '2025-03') AND (customer_parent LIKE '%APPLE%' OR SOUNDEX(customer_parent) = SOUNDEX('APPLE') OR local_assembler LIKE '%APPLE%' OR SOUNDEX(local_assembler) = SOUNDEX('APPLE') OR final_customer LIKE '%APPLE%' OR SOUNDEX(final_customer) = SOUNDEX('APPLE'))) SELECT CAST(COALESCE(b.billing_sales, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) / NULLIF(COALESCE(d.budget, 0), 0) * 100 AS hit_rate_percent FROM Billing_Apple b CROSS JOIN Budget_Apple d
What is the hit rate for Capacitor in 20: WITH Billing_Cap AS (SELECT SUM(total_sales) AS billing_sales FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE year_month LIKE '2025%' AND order_type = 'SHIPMENT' AND (pbg LIKE '%Capacitor%' OR pbu LIKE '%Capacitor%' OR pbu_1 LIKE '%Capacitor%' OR pbu_2 LIKE '%Capacitor%')), Budget_Cap AS (SELECT SUM(total_budget) AS budget FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_budget WHERE year_month LIKE '2025%' AND (pbg LIKE '%Capacitor%' OR pbu LIKE '%Capacitor%' OR pbu_1 LIKE '%Capacitor%' OR pbu_2 LIKE '%Capacitor%')) SELECT CAST(COALESCE(b.billing_sales, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) / NULLIF(COALESCE(d.budget, 0), 0) * 100 AS hit_rate_percent FROM Billing_Cap b CROSS JOIN Budget_Cap d
What is the Hit Rate % for MLCC in 2025-: WITH Billing AS (SELECT SUM(total_sales) as s FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE year_month='2025-04' AND order_type='SHIPMENT' AND (pbg='MLCC' OR pbu='MLCC' OR pbu_1='MLCC' OR pbu_2='MLCC')), Budget AS (SELECT SUM(total_budget) as b FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_budget WHERE year_month='2025-04' AND (pbg='MLCC' OR pbu='MLCC' OR pbu_1='MLCC' OR pbu_2='MLCC')) SELECT Billing.s / NULLIF(Budget.b, 0) as Hit_Rate FROM Billing CROSS JOIN Budget -- Quad-Net Search: Check all 4 product columns
What is the total budget for Capacitor i: SELECT SUM(total_budget) FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_budget WHERE pbg='Capacitor' AND year_month LIKE '2025%'
Compare sales for Distributors (G7) vs D: SELECT CASE WHEN g7_flag = 'Yes' THEN 'Distributor' ELSE 'Direct' END as channel_type, SUM(total_sales) as total_sales FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE year_month LIKE '2024%' AND order_type = 'SHIPMENT' GROUP BY CASE WHEN g7_flag = 'Yes' THEN 'Distributor' ELSE 'Direct' END
What is the BB Ratio for G7 Distributors: WITH bill AS (SELECT SUM(total_sales) AS s FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE g7_flag = 'Yes' AND year_month LIKE '2024%' AND order_type = 'SHIPMENT'), book AS (SELECT SUM(total_sales) AS s FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_booking WHERE g7_flag = 'Yes' AND year_month LIKE '2024%') SELECT book.s / NULLIF(bill.s, 0) AS BB_Ratio FROM bill CROSS JOIN book
Measure 'Sensor Synergy' - what are the: SELECT year_month, SUM(total_sales) AS sensor_sales FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE pbg = 'SENSOR' AND order_type = 'SHIPMENT' AND year_month >= FORMAT(DATEADD(MONTH, -4, GETDATE()), 'yyyy-MM') AND year_month < FORMAT(GETDATE(), 'yyyy-MM') GROUP BY year_month ORDER BY year_month
What is the 'Sensor Synergy' sales trend: SELECT year_month, SUM(total_sales) AS total_sales, SUM(total_qty) AS total_qty FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE pbg = 'SENSOR' AND order_type = 'SHIPMENT' GROUP BY year_month ORDER BY year_month
Validate 'Automotive Grade' premium - sh: SELECT year_month, SUM(total_sales) AS total_sales, SUM(total_sales) / NULLIF(SUM(total_qty), 0) AS asp FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE pbu_1 = 'AUTOMOTIVE' AND order_type = 'SHIPMENT' AND year_month >= FORMAT(DATEADD(MONTH, -7, GETDATE()), 'yyyy-MM') AND year_month < FORMAT(GETDATE(), 'yyyy-MM') GROUP BY year_month ORDER BY year_month
What is the 'Automotive Grade' sales per: SELECT year_month, SUM(total_sales) AS auto_grade_sales FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE pbu_1 = 'AUTOMOTIVE' AND order_type = 'SHIPMENT' GROUP BY year_month ORDER BY year_month
Quantify the 'AI Proxy' (High-Cap and Ta: SELECT year_month, SUM(total_sales) AS ai_proxy_sales, SUM(total_sales) / NULLIF(SUM(total_qty), 0) AS asp FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE (pbu = 'TANTALUM' OR pbu_1 IN ('HIGH CAP', 'POWER')) AND order_type = 'SHIPMENT' AND year_month >= FORMAT(DATEADD(MONTH, -4, GETDATE()), 'yyyy-MM') AND year_month < FORMAT(GETDATE(), 'yyyy-MM') GROUP BY year_month ORDER BY year_month
What is the 'AI Premium' trend?: SELECT year_month, SUM(total_sales) AS ai_premium_sales FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE (pbu = 'TANTALUM' OR pbu_1 IN ('HIGH CAP', 'POWER')) AND order_type = 'SHIPMENT' GROUP BY year_month ORDER BY year_month
SELECT pbu, pbu_1, SUM(total_sales) AS sales FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE (pbu = 'TANTALUM' OR pbu_1 IN ('HIGH CAP', 'POWER')) AND order_type = 'SHIPMENT' GROUP BY pbu, pbu_1 ORDER BY sales DESC
Battle for 'Channel Control' - show G7 v: WITH channel_data AS (SELECT year_month, CASE WHEN g7_flag = 'Yes' THEN 'G7 Distributor' ELSE 'Direct' END AS channel_group, total_sales FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE order_type = 'SHIPMENT' AND year_month >= FORMAT(DATEADD(MONTH, -4, GETDATE()), 'yyyy-MM') AND year_month < FORMAT(GETDATE(), 'yyyy-MM')) SELECT year_month, channel_group, SUM(total_sales) AS total_sales FROM channel_data GROUP BY year_month, channel_group ORDER BY year_month, channel_group
What is the 'Socket Ownership' trend?: SELECT year_month, g7_flag, SUM(total_sales) AS sales FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE order_type = 'SHIPMENT' GROUP BY year_month, g7_flag ORDER BY year_month
Expose the 'Zombie Backlog' - show old u: SELECT ru, customer_parent, SUM(total_sales) AS zombie_backlog_value FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE order_type <> 'SHIPMENT' AND DATEDIFF(DAY, CAST(year_month + '-01' AS DATE), GETDATE()) > 90 GROUP BY ru, customer_parent ORDER BY zombie_backlog_value DESC
What is the 'Zombie Backlog' by region?: SELECT ru, SUM(total_sales) AS zombie_value FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE order_type <> 'SHIPMENT' AND DATEDIFF(DAY, CAST(year_month + '-01' AS DATE), GETDATE()) > 90 GROUP BY ru ORDER BY zombie_value DESC
Identify the 'Past Due' Risk - show top: SELECT customer_parent, SUM(total_sales) AS past_due_value FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE order_type = 'PAST DUE' GROUP BY customer_parent ORDER BY past_due_value DESC
Perform a Global Health Check for the la: WITH curr AS (SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN order_type = 'SHIPMENT' THEN total_sales ELSE 0 END) AS billing, SUM(CASE WHEN order_type = 'SHIPMENT' THEN total_sales - total_cost ELSE 0 END) AS gp FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE year_month = FORMAT(DATEADD(MONTH, -1, GETDATE()), 'yyyy-MM')), prev AS (SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN order_type = 'SHIPMENT' THEN total_sales ELSE 0 END) AS billing, SUM(CASE WHEN order_type = 'SHIPMENT' THEN total_sales - total_cost ELSE 0 END) AS gp FROM ods.fact_monthly_sales_poa_billing WHERE year_month = FORMAT(DATEADD(MONTH, -2, GETDATE()), 'yyyy-MM')) SELECT curr.billing, curr.gp, curr.gp / NULLIF(curr.billing, 0) AS gm_pct, (curr.billing - prev.billing) / NULLIF(prev.billing, 0) AS billing_mom, (curr.gp - prev.gp) / NULLIF(prev.gp, 0) AS gp_mom FROM curr CROSS JOIN prev
